channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists achieve quantum time reversal in stunning physics breakthrough
item.description: Researchers have developed quantum control techniques that make a system appear to run backward in time. By precisely managing quantum measurements,...

item.title: Old muscle stem cells can act young again but there's a catch
item.description: Scientists at UCLA discovered a surprising reason aging muscles heal more slowly. In older muscle stem cells, a protein called NDRG1 builds up and act...

item.title: An unusual LIGO signal may reveal the missing link behind dark matter
item.description: A strange gravitational wave signal has renewed hopes that primordial black holes, once purely theoretical, may soon be detectable.

item.title: Bumble bees surprise scientists by solving a classic intelligence test
item.description: Bumble bees amazed researchers by inventing a new method to reach a hidden reward, despite no prior training. The finding adds to growing evidence of insect intelligence.
